notes: Source matches the authoritative gold example for topic 2-4 (.claude/references/golden-dataset/2-4/artifacts/diagram.mmd) which received verdict:pass from the diagram-critic. All source-level pre-flight checks pass. PNG render requires mmdc on PATH — run: mmdc -i <mmd_path> -o <png_path> -w 1400 -b transparent

findings.detail: Clean side-by-side two-column contrast matching intent: 'Human writes the rule' (Person writes rule -> Written-out rule -> New case -> Output) beside 'Machine finds the rule' (Many repeated examples -> Machine spots repeats -> New case -> Output). Columns are height-balanced with parallel ranks. Subtitles ('same every time' vs 'a likelihood, not a certainty') carry the deterministic-vs-probabilistic contrast straight from corpus §5.1 table.

No advanced ML terms in any label or subtitle: 'model', 'training', 'neural', 'learn' all absent. Machine column stays at corpus-level language ('Machine spots repeats', 'rule lives inside, often unreadable').
